message:
feat(search): move lsearch/lfind linear search to core (bd-srch-5)

Sub-bead 5 of bd-srch-epic. Linear-search algorithm moved into
frankenlibc-core/src/search/linear.rs as a pure-safe Rust API
operating on &[u8].

Core API:
- lfind_index(base, width, nel, matches) -> Option<usize>
  Iterates nel records of given width, calls matches() per record,
  returns the matching index. Overflow-checked nel*width.
- lsearch_or_append_index(...) -> SearchOrAppend::{Found(idx),
  AppendAt(idx)}
- SearchOrAppend enum

Abi rewire:
- lfind: builds &[u8] via slice::from_raw_parts, wraps C comparator
  in a closure, translates returned index back to *mut c_void via
  base.add(idx * width)
- lsearch: same pattern; on AppendAt, performs the
  copy_nonoverlapping into the user buffer + nel++

7 core linear unit tests (find_existing, misses, zero_width,
oversize_nel, lsearch_existing, lsearch_missing, multibyte_records)
+ 10 conformance tests pass with no regression. 24 total core
search tests (12 rb_tree + 5 hash + 7 linear).

Closes bd-srch-5; bd-srch-6 will round out the epic with parity
verification.
